subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down from the heaven of Revelation unto her who believed when she heard the call of her Lord, the Mighty, the Wise, that she may draw nigh through His Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل من سماء الوحی للتی آمنت اذ سمعت ندآء ربها العزیز الحکیم لتقربها کلمه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation
